channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: PS6 Won’t be Delayed to 2028 or 2029, It’s Claimed
item.content:encoded:
We’re still a while away from the PS6, with plenty of life left in the current generation. However, we’ve already heard plenty of leaks and rumors about the new console, and now reports have been swirling that Sony is ready to delay the console’s launch.

You might have heard conflicting reports about the PS6‘s release. One minute, we’re hearing that the PS6 may be released as late as 2029, whereas industry insider KeplerL2 has stated the PS6 is set to release in 2027.

Kepler is the focus of our attention, as they have delivered some interesting updates on the PS6’s future.

‘No,’ is the Leaker’s Simple Response to PS6 Delay

In a NeoGAF thread discussing the PS6 being delayed, and that the console will launch in 2028 or 2029, KeplerL2 appeared with a familiar GIF—Frank Reynolds from It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia shaking his head.

This is a clear indication that Kepler doesn’t believe the PS6 will be delayed, despite the PS6 launch window remaining uncertain amid memory prices.

He also liked another user’s post, which stated:

‘Delaying the console when it’s basically done doesn’t make any sense. They have TSMC contracts for the production of APUs, maybe even GDDR7 contracts with memory makers. R&D has cost them a few hundred million. PS5 sales are slowing down, and there is no guarantee that memory prices will drop between now and 2030. Releasing it in 2027, several million units sold before 2030, when memory price drops, you just lower price of the console and gain massive market share. Releasing it in 2030, no sales – 2030 memory prices could be lower the same or higher you start from scratch.’

If all this is true, we could see the PS6 next year! It will probably be another November launch, if this is the case, and it would be the next leap in gaming.

We’ll keep monitoring all leaks and reports concerning the PS6 and when we can expect to see or hear about it officially.

Until we hear more about the PS6, let’s enjoy the PS5, and one of its biggest games coming up is Marvel’s Wolverine!

Let us know what you’ve made of the PS6 leaks so far through the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the latest on the leaked GTA 6 price online isn’t what you think, and don’t forget to sign up for our Insider Gaming Newsletter.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: All Pokémon Pokopia Wish Upon a Jirachi Limited Time Items & How to Get Them
item.content:encoded:
More content continues to be added to Pokémon Pokopia, with the latest limited-time event bringing Jirachi into the fray alongside a bunch of event-exclusive items.

Jirachi is the latest addition to the bolstering roster in Pokopia, which will continue to get bigger as Koei Tecmo expands the game and Pokémon fans eagerly await the release of Pokémon Winds & Waves in 2027.

If you’re keen to get your hands on everything that’s available in the Wish Upon a Jirachi event, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All Wish Upon a Jirachi Limited-Time Items

There are 10 special event items only available for a limited time during the Wish Upon a Jirachi event in Pokémon Pokopia, which has different mechanics to previous events.

Unlike requiring Cloud Island-obtained resources like the previous events for Jumpluff’s evolution line and Sableye, the Jirachi event requires completing Pokémon requests to obtain Shining Wish Notes.

  • Related: All New Mega Pokémon & Abilities in Pokémon Champions Regulation M-B

Once obtained, these are exchanged with Jirachi inside a reconstructed Pokémon Center for limited-time items, used to decorate your towns and build Habitats.

The table below shows all of the limited-time items and the required amount of Shining Wish Notes to unlock them.

Can You Buy Multiple Items From the Wish Upon a Jirachi Event?

Yes, you can buy as many decorations in the Wish Upon a Jirachi event in Pokémon Pokopia as you like, and there’s no limit to the number of Shining Wish Notes you can obtain.

This means you can create an entire town dedicated to Jirachi, if you want to, but the items are only available for a limited time. Therefore, you’ll need to stock up on Shining Wish Notes to exchange as quickly as possible.

  • Related: All New Pokémon & Held Items in Pokémon Champions in Regulation M-B Update

Once the event period has concluded, Jirachi will no longer be waiting inside the Pokémon Center for Shining Wish Notes, but the Pokémon can stay in your town, as long as you build

There’s still more to come in Pokopia, however, with the recently announced Expansion Pass, which you can watch the trailer for below.

What item is your favourite in the Wish Upon a Jirachi event? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, find out how to get 100 free Quick Coupons in Pokémon Champions, and don’t forget to sign up for the Insider Gaming newsletter.

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1830: Hints and Answer for June 23, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Wordle challenges players to guess a fresh five-letter word each day in six tries or fewer. Whether you’re a beginner or a daily player, today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1830 for June 23, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, June 23, 2026

Today’s Wordle answer for game #1830 is a moderately challenging puzzle. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 4.4 out of 6 guesses.

General Wordle Hints For June 23

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: Type of food
  • Hint 2: Typically involves a sauce or gravy
  • Hint 3: Originally from India

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1830 for June 23, 2026.

Starter Words For June 23, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • CRANE
  • DAIRY
  • CARRY
  • JUMPY
  • PARTY

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1830 On June 23, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: CURRY

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

A Curry is a food dish that originated in India, and it consists of meat or vegetables in a sauce.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1830

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads-up. The game on June 24 will be Wordle Game #1831.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For June 23, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, June 23, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Hand tool
  • Hint 2: Heavy iron or steel bar
  • Hint 3: Used to pry things open

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Knife
  • Wrench
  • Screwdriver
  • Chisel
  • Hammer
  • Tool
  • Wedge
  • Level
  • Pry

Today’s Contexto Answer For June 23, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Crowbar

A Crowbar is a heavy iron bar with a bent end that is used to help lift heavy objects or force things open.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on June 24.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…
